test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id), MAX(user_id), MAX(user_id) + 1, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id), MAX(user_id), MAX(user_id) + 1, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp

SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id) AS user_id_count, MAX(user_id) AS user_id_max, MAX(user_id) + 1 AS user_id_expression_max, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) AS subquery_expression FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp

SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(user_id) AS user_id_count, MAX(user_id) AS user_id_max, MAX(user_id) + 1 AS user_id_expression_max, (SELECT 1 + 1 FROM DUAL) AS subquery_expression FROM t_user WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM t_user u WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM t_user u WHERE user_id = ? GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "distinct_count" FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS "distinct_count" FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT * FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_count FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp
SELECT temp.* FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS distinct_count FROM t_user u GROUP BY user_id) temp

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tmp_tb.*, ROWNUM AS row_id FROM ( SELECT bsc.*, ue.USR_TYP_CD, ue.REG_CHL_CD FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT u.ID, u.USR_NM, u.OPEN_ID, u.MP, u.E_MAIL , u.QQ, u.IS_SYS_DEF, u.IS_VALID, u.IS_DEL, u.CRT_TM , u.CRT_USR_ID, u.MDF_TM, u.MDF_USR_ID, us.IS_SYS_DEF AS REF_IS_SYS_DEF, us.RL_NM AS REF_RL_NM , us.ID AS REF_ID, us.PWD AS REF_PWD, us.SYS_CD AS REF_SYS_CD, us.REG_TYP_CD AS REF_REG_TYP_CD, us.REG_DT AS REF_REG_DT , us.IS_VALID AS REF_IS_VALID, us.IS_DEL AS REF_IS_DEL, us.CERT_TYP_CD AS REF_CERT_TYP_CD, us.CERT_NO AS REF_CERT_NO, us.REF_MP AS REF_REF_MP , us.NICK_NM AS REF_NICK_NM, us.LATELY_LOGIN_TM AS REF_LATELY_LOGIN_TM, us.NO_TALK_TYP AS REF_NO_TALK_TYP, us.NO_TALK_TM AS REF_NO_TALK_TM, us.REF_USR_ID AS REF_REF_USR_ID , us.REF_USR_BUS_TYP AS REF_REF_USR_BUS_TYP, us.SALT AS REF_SALT, us.PWD_CRT_TM AS REF_PWD_CRT_TM, us.LOCK_STATE AS REF_LOCK_STATE, us.IS_LEAVE AS REF_IS_LEAVE , us.PER_TYPE_CD AS REF_PER_TYPE_CD, us.MP_STS_CD AS REF_MP_STS_CD FROM SYS_USR u INNER JOIN SYS_USR_SYS_R us ON u.id = us.usr_id WHERE u.IS_DEL = 0 AND us.IS_DEL = 0 AND us.SYS_CD = ? ) bsc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ext.* FROM ( SELECT USR_ID, USR_TYP_CD, REG_CHL_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USR_ID ORDER BY CRT_TM) AS row_ord FROM SYS_USR_EXT_INFO ) ext WHERE ext.row_ord = ? ) ue ON bsc.id = ue.usr_id ORDER BY bsc.CRT_TM DESC, bsc."ID" ) tmp_tb WHERE ROWNUM <= ? ) WHERE row_id > ?

SELECT bsc.*, ue.USR_TYP_CD, ue.REG_CHL_CD FROM ( SELECT u.ID, u.USR_NM, u.OPEN_ID, u.MP, u.E_MAIL , u.QQ, u.IS_SYS_DEF, u.IS_VALID, u.IS_DEL, u.CRT_TM , u.CRT_USR_ID, u.MDF_TM, u.MDF_USR_ID FROM SYS_USR u WHERE u.ID = 1 AND u.IS_DEL = ? ) bsc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ext.* FROM ( SELECT USR_ID, USR_TYP_CD, REG_CHL_CD, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USR_ID ORDER BY CRT_TM) AS row_ord FROM SYS_USR_EXT_INFO ) ext WHERE ext.row_ord = ? ) ue ON bsc.id = ue.usr_id
